summary.description: Human-readable outcome summary (same text as the tool's text content).

runId.description: Daemon run id (recovery handle for inspect/follow/apply/decision); null for in-process read-only runs.

runDir.description: Artifact directory of the run; null when not persisted.

status.description: Terminal run LIFECYCLE (succeeded | failed | cancelled | interrupted).

noChanges.description: True when the run finished without changing any files (the ex no_op fact).

checks.description: Deterministic checks axis: configured project checks passed, failed, or none are configured (a named state, never a stand-in for review results).

review.description: Review axis: approved (clean cross-family verified review), blocked (open accepted findings), or not_run.

anyOf.description: Typed reason qualifying a non-clean terminal; null on a clean success.

reason.description: Typed reason qualifying a non-clean terminal; null on a clean success.

state.description: Folded work state: the WorkReport state, or unverified when no report was obtainable (transport unsupported / lane gated).

source.description: Provenance of a WorkReport: constrained (native schema transport), validated (whole-answer JSON), or absent (no transport could carry one — a disclosed absence, not a failure).

kind.description: Category of a missing input a needs_input/incomplete report lists: a file, additional context, a credential, a permission, a human decision, or an external dependency.

locator.description: Concrete pointer to the missing thing (path/url/name); null when unnameable.

description.description: Human-readable description of what is needed and why.

items.description: One blocking input a needs_input/incomplete WorkReport lists.

required_inputs.description: Carried through from a needs_input/incomplete WorkReport for honest disclosure.

work_state.description: D-16 model-attested work outcome, orthogonal to lifecycle; a needs_input/incomplete state vetoes applyability and exit 0. Absent on runs with no work_report transport.

anyOf.description: Independent terminal outcome axes of a run (D8/D18).

outcomeFacts.description: The D8 terminal outcome axes (checks/review/reason/noChanges); null for non-terminal or read-only routes.

eligible.description: True when the apply gate would accept this run's patch right now.

state.description: The gate's apply-eligibility classification (e.g. needs_review | not_verified | no_changes | ok) when known.

reason.description: The gate's refusal text when not eligible (null when eligible).

requiredAction.description: Honest guidance for what actually unblocks apply (typed operator decision, add gates, re-run, or nothing to apply).

anyOf.description: Derived apply-gate verdict for a run's WorkProduct (single producer in the delivery gate).

applyEligibility.description: Apply-gate verdict for mutating runs; null for read-only routes or when no patch exists.

outcomeBanner.description: Server-owned outcome headline (D18); the single honest one-line verdict, null while non-terminal or unavailable.

state.description: Derived plan readiness: ready (block parsed, zero open questions), needs_answers (open questions remain), unverified (no parseable block — the planner ignored the format).

anyOf.description: Server-derived readiness of a plan run (one derivation owner; D17).

planReadiness.description: Derived plan readiness for plan tools (D17); null for non-plan tools.

McpRunToolResult.description: Structured MCP tool result for Claudexor run tools.
